findings.detail: Clean single-row cycle: Plan -> Attack -> Find -> Fix -> Re-test, with a bottom return arrow labeled 'repeat' looping Re-test back to Attack. The loop-back reads unambiguously as a cycle. No overlaps, no truncation; node and 12px subtitle text all legible at 1400px. Color tiers correct (Plan=start blue, Attack/Find/Fix=auto purple, Re-test=done green). The 3-point timeline (before deployment / after updates / ongoing) sits in the title banner as surrounding context, not as a node — title discipline honored. No scope-creep nodes (no jailbreak / prompt-injection / governance nodes).
